name: Taipei Star Bank
summary: Taipei Star Bank provides various banking products and services in Taiwan. The company accepts check deposits, demand deposits, and time deposits; and domestic foreign exchange and commercial bills. It also provides short-term, medium-term, and long-term loans; bill discounts; letters of credit; treasury bills; safe deposit box; and guarantees. In addition, the company also invests in financial, public, short-term, and corporate bonds, as well as stocks; collects and pays against agents; and purchases and sells foreign currencies cash and traveler cheque. Further, it provides warehousing, and storage and agency services. The company was formerly known as Bank of Taipei, Ltd. Taipei Star Bank is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
